info.title: Agent Paste API
info.description: Workspace-scoped JSON API for publishing and reading Agent View artifacts.

WorkOsBearer.description: WorkOS AuthKit access token forwarded by the web Worker.

get.summary: Resolve the authenticated actor and usage policy.

schema.description: Caller-supplied request id. Worker echoes it back; non-matching values are replaced with a UUID.

parameters.description: Caller-supplied request id. Worker echoes it back; non-matching values are replaced with a UUID.
parameters.name: X-Request-Id

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Error codes include rate_limited_actor, rate_limited_artifact, and rate_limited_workspace.

schema.description: Seconds to wait before retrying.
